overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with pink hair and a gold jacket interacting with street food vendors in a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character visits two different food stalls on an elevated pedestrian walkway surrounded by towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: street food cart on elevated walkway

events.description: vendor flips food on the neon-lit grill causing sparks and smoke
character turns and begins walking away from the food cart

agents.ego_description: standing at a street food cart watching the vendor cook on a grill illuminated by red and cyan neon lights

notable_agents.action: vendor cooking food on a neon-lit grill, occasionally stirring and flipping items

entered.detail: metal food cart with glowing red and cyan neon lights underneath the cooking surface
two yellow plastic storage containers sitting on the ground next to the cart
low concrete wall separating the walkway from the drop below
large glowing advertisements on distant buildings displaying various products

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a street food cart on an elevated walkway at night. A vendor tends to a grill illuminated by vibrant neon lights while the player character, wearing a gold jacket and purple shorts, observes. The background shows a futuristic cityscape with towering buildings and holographic advertisements.

events.description: leaving the food cart area and entering the open plaza
passing by blue neon-lit benches on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking away from the food cart through the pedestrian plaza toward another vendor area

entered.detail: futuristic benches with glowing blue and pink neon lights underneath
glass and metal escalator leading to lower levels

segments.scene_description: The character walks away from the food cart into a wider pedestrian plaza. The camera follows through the open area, passing blue neon-lit benches and approaching an escalator structure. Other pedestrians are visible walking in various directions across the tiled surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: food vendor counter with digital menu displays

events.description: approaching the second food vendor with a long counter and green stools
female vendor appears behind the counter and gestures

agents.ego_description: walking up to a food counter with green stools and examining the digital menu displays

notable_agents.action: female vendor standing behind the counter, gesturing and talking to the customer

entered.detail: long counter with illuminated display cases and four green bar stools
large screen displaying menu items and advertisements including 'ALL FOODS'
tall vending machine with glowing blue lights and transparent front
glass display case with various food items visible inside

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a permanent food vendor stall with a long counter and green stools. A female vendor stands behind the counter near a digital menu screen and vending machine. The camera moves along the counter, showing various food displays and neon lighting strips overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with city skyline view

events.description: leaving the food counter and returning to the open walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated walkway past other pedestrians with the city skyline visible

notable_agents.action: group of people standing near the glass railing looking at the city view

entered.detail: transparent glass safety railing along the edge of the walkway
tall buildings with illuminated windows and neon accents forming the city skyline

segments.scene_description: The character walks away from the second food vendor along the elevated walkway. The camera captures views of the futuristic city skyline with towering skyscrapers and neon lights. Other pedestrians are visible walking and standing near the glass railing, enjoying the urban night view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit futuristic plaza, transitioning from an intimate street food encounter to a wide view of the urban skyline. It begins at a vibrant food cart where a vendor tends a grill under the glow of holographic advertisements, before the camera follows the character in a gold jacket as they move away into a wider pedestrian plaza. As the character navigates past blue neon-lit benches and other pedestrians, the scene shifts toward a permanent food stall featuring a long counter with green stools and a digital menu. The camera then glides along the counter's neon lighting strips before turning to follow the character as they walk away toward the edge of the elevated walkway. Finally, the view expands to reveal the towering skyscrapers and shimmering city skyline as pedestrians gather near the glass railing to overlook the night.
